# Monarch Castle Technologies

Monarch Castle Technologies builds operational intelligence products and browser-only deterministic tools.

Important pages:
- Home: https://monarchcastletech.github.io/
- Free tools: https://monarchcastletech.github.io/tools.html
- MCP packs: https://monarchcastletech.github.io/mcp.html
- MCP catalog JSON: https://monarchcastletech.github.io/mcp-catalog.json

Related:
- Monarch Castle Holdings: https://monarchcastleholdings.github.io/
- Strategic Data Company of Ankara: https://sdcofa.github.io/

Contact: monarchcastleholdings@gmail.com
